ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "size_chart_name" TEXT /* Name of the size chart */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size chart */,
  "product_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product type the size chart belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size chart was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size chart was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_product_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_type_id") REFERENCES product_types ("product_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart the size belongs to */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., S, M, L) */,
  "chest" REAL /* Chest measurement for the size */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement for the size */,
  "across_shoulder" REAL /* Across shoulder measurement for the size */,
  "length" REAL /* Length measurement for the size */,
  "hip" REAL /* Hip measurement for the size */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Sleeve length measurement for the size */,
  "inseam" REAL /* Inseam measurement for the size */,
  "shoulder_to_shoulder" REAL /* Shoulder-to-shoulder measurement for the size */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "product_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product type */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the product is designed */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_product_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_type_id") REFERENCES product_types ("product_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_types" (
  "product_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product type */,
  "product_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the product type (e.g., tops, bottoms) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product size */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the size belongs to */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Available stock quantity for the product size */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product size was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product size was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, customer) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_mappings" (
  "user_role_mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_mappings_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_mappings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the image was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the image was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_images_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
